name: @aphotic/pi-release
description_en: Standalone, project-agnostic release skill for Pi: drives single-package and monorepo releases through one interface with shape auto-detection, a full security audit, manual release-notes review, user-owned credentialed actions, and a governed .pi/release
description_zh: Pi 的独立、项目无关的发布技能：通过一个界面驱动单包和 monorepo 发布，具有形状自动检测、完整安全审计、手动发布说明审查、用户拥有的凭据操作和受控的 .pi/release
